# tool_usage_analyzer module constants
BASH_RATIO_THRESHOLD = 0.4
BUILTIN_THRESHOLD = 10
COMPLIANCE_GOOD_THRESHOLD = 0.9
REPEATING_THRESHOLD = 5
SLEEP_THRESHOLD = 20
STALL_RECOVERY_MIN_SESSIONS = 2
STALL_RECOVERY_RECENCY_DAYS = 30

# tool_usage_analyzer public function / class signatures
analyze_tool_usage(project_root: pathlib.Path | None = None, threshold: int = 5, *, projects_dir: pathlib.Path | None = None) -> Dict[str, Any]
check_artifact_installed(artifact: Dict[str, Any], *, hooks_dir: pathlib.Path | None = None, rules_dir: pathlib.Path | None = None, settings_path: pathlib.Path | None = None) -> Dict[str, Any]
check_hook_installed(*, hook_path: pathlib.Path | None = None, settings_path: pathlib.Path | None = None) -> Dict[str, Any]
classify_bash_commands(commands: List[str]) -> Dict[str, List[Dict[str, Any]]]
detect_repeating_commands(commands: List[str], threshold: int = 5) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
detect_stall_recovery_patterns(session_commands: Dict[str, List[str]]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
extract_tool_calls(project_root: pathlib.Path | None = None, *, projects_dir: pathlib.Path | None = None) -> Tuple[collections.Counter, List[str]]
extract_tool_calls_by_session(project_root: pathlib.Path | None = None, *, projects_dir: pathlib.Path | None = None, max_age_days: int | None = None) -> Dict[str, List[str]]
generate_hook_template(builtin_replaceable: List[Dict[str, Any]], *, output_dir: pathlib.Path | None = None) -> Dict[str, Any] | None
generate_rule_candidates(builtin_replaceable: List[Dict[str, Any]], *, rules_dir: pathlib.Path | None = None) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
stall_pattern_to_pitfall_candidate(pattern: Dict[str, Any], existing_candidates: List[Dict[str, Any]] | None = None) -> Dict[str, Any] | None
